Functions
SJIS_Convert
c8* SJIS_Convert(
const c8* src,
c8* dest
)

Convert a Shift-JIS text into MSX font format

Parameters
src
const c8*

Source string in Shift-JIS format (Zero terminated)

dest
c8*

Destination string (Zero terminated). Buffer must be big enough to contain the resulting string

Return

Pointer to the destination string

SJIS_ToJIS
u16 SJIS_ToJIS(
u16 sjis
)

Convert a Shift-JIS code into JIS code

Parameters
sjis
u16

Shift-JIS code

Return

JIS code

JIS_ToSJIS
u16 JIS_ToSJIS(
u16 jis
)

Convert a JIS code into Shift-JIS code

Parameters
jis
u16

JIS code

Return

Shift-JIS code

JIS_ToKuTen
inline u16 JIS_ToKuTen(
u16 jis
)

Convert a JIS code into KuTen code

Parameters
jis
u16

JIS code

Return

KuTen code
